scope: G组/H组第二轮四场赛前量化预测回测、误差归因与参数迭代建议；不输出投注建议。

metric_definitions.score_abs_error: sum of absolute team-goal errors between predicted xG and actual goals
metric_definitions.goal_total_error: absolute difference between predicted total xG and actual total goals
metric_definitions.goal_diff_error: absolute difference between predicted xG differential and actual goal differential
metric_definitions.brier_1x2: multi-class Brier score over win/draw/loss probabilities
metric_definitions.log_loss_1x2: negative natural log of predicted probability assigned to actual 1X2 result
metric_definitions.top5_covered_actual: whether actual exact score appeared in pre-match top five scorelines

market_calibration_backtest.model_vs_market: Model discounted Belgium and raised draw/Iran relative to market.
market_calibration_backtest.note: Market was too hot on Belgium for the actual 0-0, but the model still overestimated total scoring and did not lift 0-0 enough.

bias_diagnosis: 低位防守与门将/禁区封堵造成的零封尾部不足。
比利时进攻均值仍偏高，未充分反映首轮后转换率问题。
平局概率方向相对市场更好，但 0-0 exact-score tail 仍偏薄。

player_state_backtest_link.reason: G组 postmortem JSON is present; data thread marked player_state_update_status=partial with emergency source limits.

market_calibration_backtest.model_vs_market: Model kept New Zealand/draw materially higher after round-one player-state upgrades.
market_calibration_backtest.note: Market was closer on Egypt win; model overreacted to New Zealand's round-one attacking spike and underweighted Egypt 3-goal tail.

bias_diagnosis: 对新西兰首轮 Wood/Just 状态上修偏大，压低了埃及胜率和多球胜尾部。
埃及 Salah/Marmoush/Ashour 进攻质量的上限未充分进入比分分布。
大小球被低估，1-3 处在非 top5 尾部。

player_state_backtest_link.reason: G组 postmortem JSON is present; data thread marked player_state_update_status=partial with emergency source limits.

market_calibration_backtest.model_vs_market: Model retained much more draw/Saudi tail than market.
market_calibration_backtest.note: Market's Spain strength signal was directionally helpful; model correctly favored Spain but underweighted 4-0/blowout tail.

bias_diagnosis: 强队压制低位后扩大比分的尾部分布不足。
均值 xG 还可以解释胜负方向，但 4球零封概率偏低。
对沙特韧性和低位生存的上修在本场过重。

player_state_backtest_link.reason: H组 postmortem JSON is present; data thread marked player_state_update_status=partial with emergency source limits.

market_calibration_backtest.model_vs_market: Model raised Cape Verde/draw relative to market and lowered Uruguay.
market_calibration_backtest.note: Model was better than market on draw direction but still badly underweighted Cape Verde scoring and 2-2 exact-score tail.

bias_diagnosis: 佛得角低位韧性被识别，但进攻/反击得分尾部仍偏低。
乌拉圭强队均值较高但无法转化为胜局，平局尾部仍不足。
低估了非洲小队在落后/对攻阶段的韧性和二次得分能力。

player_state_backtest_link.reason: H组 postmortem JSON is present; data thread marked player_state_update_status=partial with emergency source limits.

misled_or_overheated: Cape Verde vs Uruguay favorite strength
mixed: Cape Verde vs Uruguay draw tail

common_biases.evidence: All four actual exact scores were outside the pre-match top five scorelines.
common_biases.model_implication: Keep Poisson mean for direction, but widen exact-score tail for 0-0, 1-3, 4-0 and 2-2 style outcomes.

common_biases.evidence: Spain 4-0 Saudi Arabia and Egypt 3-1 New Zealand both exceeded pre-match total-goal tails.
common_biases.model_implication: When market, squad strength and tactical mismatch align, add tail dispersion rather than only raising favorite win probability.

common_biases.evidence: Belgium 0-0 Iran had only 7.07% exact-score probability and was outside top five.
common_biases.model_implication: Raise zero-inflation / low-event draw handling when favorite conversion is uncertain and underdog block is experienced.

common_biases.evidence: Egypt scored three; Cape Verde scored two and drew Uruguay; Iran kept Belgium scoreless.
common_biases.model_implication: Do not treat compact underdogs only as under/low-scoring agents; preserve counter, set-piece and late-game scoring tails.

common_biases.evidence: Market helped on Egypt and Spain but was too hot on Belgium and Uruguay.
common_biases.model_implication: Use market as directional support only when tactical mismatch and internal model agree; discount market favorite heat after weak conversion signals.

parameter_updates.new: add +0.03 to +0.06 redistributed mass into favorite 3+ goal win tails when strength, market and tactical mismatch align
parameter_updates.reason: Spain 4-0 and Egypt 3-1 were outside top five despite correct favorite direction.
parameter_updates.applicable_scope: elite or clearly superior favorite vs low-block/limited-chase opponent; next-round use only with lineup confirmation
parameter_updates.overfit_guard: Do not raise mean xG blindly; only increase tail dispersion and cap at +0.06.

parameter_updates.reason: Belgium-Iran produced 0-0 after model already recognized favorite market heat but still kept total xG too high.
parameter_updates.applicable_scope: favorite conversion uncertain, opponent experienced low block, T-75m lineup lacks clear finisher upgrade
parameter_updates.overfit_guard: Do not apply when favorite has early-goal or set-piece mismatch signal.

parameter_updates.old: player_state up to +0.16 from one strong opening match
parameter_updates.new: cap single-match positive player_state adjustment at +0.10 unless supported by role continuity and opponent-adjusted xG
parameter_updates.reason: New Zealand attacking upgrade after 2-2 Iran appears too strong against Egypt.
parameter_updates.applicable_scope: teams whose round-one spike came from one or two players and a high-variance game state
parameter_updates.overfit_guard: Maintain individual notes, but reduce team-level aggregate bump.

parameter_updates.reason: Egypt, Cape Verde and Iran each beat model expectations in resilience or scoring suppression/production.
parameter_updates.applicable_scope: CAF teams with compact block, transition outlets, set-piece threat, or proven second-half resilience
parameter_updates.overfit_guard: Not a confederation-only blanket; require tactical and player-state evidence.

parameter_updates.old: market_adjustment 0.05-0.10 applied as broad probability calibration
parameter_updates.new: split into market_direction_weight and market_tail_weight; direction max 0.06, tail max 0.04
parameter_updates.reason: Market helped Spain/Egypt direction but misled Belgium/Uruguay favorite heat.
parameter_updates.applicable_scope: all matches with public odds snippets but no official same-source complete market snapshot
parameter_updates.overfit_guard: Official/same-source odds can receive higher trust only after overround and timestamp are clean.

parameter_updates.old: mostly driven by mean xG below 0.8
parameter_updates.new: +0.02 to +0.04 exact-score tail for 2-goal underdog outcomes when set-piece/counter evidence exists
parameter_updates.reason: Cape Verde 2-2 Uruguay exposed underdog two-goal tail as too thin.
parameter_updates.applicable_scope: underdogs with transition outlet plus opponent rest-defense or game-management risk
parameter_updates.overfit_guard: Do not apply to teams with no open-play route or no set-piece evidence.

player_state_backtest_link.note: Data thread postmortem files are present and mark player_state_update_status=partial. Member tables/player_state/rosters have second-round internal rating records under partial_source_limited constraints; official full lineups/minutes and external same-source ratings remain incomplete.

quality_notes: This is a model backtest using pre-match prediction JSON plus user-provided verified results.
Data thread postmortem JSON files are present; player-state linkage is partial_source_limited_updated, not fully complete.
No betting advice is included; odds are treated only as calibration signals.
